title: event — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Lifecycle events fan out to notifications + activity + audit. Financial-relevant events (EventPricingChanged after registration_open) additionally feed the audit stream with 7-year retention because post-registration price shifts create refund liability. EventMinorEligibilityCorrected is critical-severity because narrowing min/max age post-registration excludes existing registrants (same refund-liability shape). EventCancellationBroadcast is the highest-severity operational event — cannot-opt-out notification to every registered participant.

events.name: EventCreated
events.trigger: EventProvisioner completed a successful create. Fires exactly once per `events.id`.

payload.name: string
payload.event_type: string (tournament / match / showcase / workshop / camp / conference / social / graduation / awards_ceremony / open_house / other)

events.name: EventUpdated
events.trigger: Any Event scalar field mutated except the specific-transition fields (status, visibility, starts_at, ends_at, branch_id, entry_fee_cents, min_age, max_age, age_group_ids). Umbrella event for renames, description edits, hero_image_url changes, sort tweaks.

events.name: EventStatusChanged
events.trigger: Event.status transitioned to any new value. A superset event; the specific-state events below (EventAnnounced, EventRegistrationOpened, ...) fire alongside for the routing case that cares.

events.name: EventAnnounced
events.trigger: Event.status transitioned draft -> announced. First point at which the event is visible on public/tenant surfaces. Fires alongside EventStatusChanged.

events.name: EventRegistrationOpened
events.trigger: Event.status transitioned to registration_open. Automated (RollEventStatusJob when now() reaches registration_opens_at) OR manual admin.

events.name: EventRegistrationClosed
events.trigger: Event.status transitioned registration_open -> registration_closed. Automated (ExpireExpiredEventRegistrationsJob) OR manual. Late-registration window is independent — see allow_late_registration flag.

events.name: EventStarted
events.trigger: Event.status transitioned to in_progress. Fires from RollEventStatusJob at starts_at OR manual admin start.

events.name: EventCompleted
events.trigger: Event.status transitioned in_progress -> completed. Fires from RollEventStatusJob at ends_at + 1h grace OR manual admin.

events.name: EventCancelled
events.trigger: Event.status transitioned to cancelled (from any pre-completed state). Requires cancellation_reason. Cannot be reversed except by restore-to-draft flow.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years — refund + registrant records outlive event)

events.name: EventRescheduled
events.trigger: Event.starts_at OR Event.ends_at changed on an announced-or-later event. AUDIT-WARN: affects every registered participant's calendar.

events.name: EventVenueChanged
events.trigger: Event.branch_id OR primary facility changed post-registration_open. AUDIT-WARN — participants planned around the venue.

events.name: EventCapacityChanged
events.trigger: Event.max_participants OR max_teams changed. Informational; the enrollment surface enforces the cap.

events.name: EventPricingChanged
events.trigger: Event.entry_fee_cents, entry_fee_currency, late_registration_fee_cents, OR prize_pool_cents changed. AUDIT-CRITICAL when Event.status IN (registration_open, registration_closed, in_progress) — post-registration price shifts create refund liability; every fire retained 7 years.

payload.audit_severity: 'info' | 'warn' | 'critical' (critical when Event was already accepting registrations)

events.name: EventMinorEligibilityCorrected
events.trigger: Event.min_age, max_age, OR age_group_ids narrowed after registrations opened. AUDIT-CRITICAL when the narrowing excludes existing registrants — same refund-liability shape as EventPricingChanged.
consumers: notifications::DispatchEventMinorEligibilityCorrectedNotification (cannot-opt-out to excluded registrants + guardians of excluded minors)

events.name: EventArchived
events.trigger: Event.status transitioned completed -> archived OR cancelled -> archived. Soft-delete; the row is hidden from tenant selectors + registration flows but readable via `?include_archived=true`.

events.name: EventRestored
events.trigger: Archived -> completed OR archived -> cancelled (whichever it was prior to archive). Only within the retention window (default 2555 days = 7 years).

events.name: EventPublished
events.trigger: Event.visibility transitioned to 'public' from any non-public value. Event now appears on public listings + search.

events.name: EventUnpublished
events.trigger: Event.visibility transitioned from 'public' to any non-public value. Event no longer appears on public listings.

events.name: EventFacilityAdded
events.trigger: A new event_facilities row created. Fires per attachment.

events.name: EventFacilityRemoved
events.trigger: An event_facilities row soft-deleted. Fires per detachment. Refused via observer when the event is in_progress + the row is primary + no other facility can replace it.

events.name: EventPrimaryFacilityChanged
events.trigger: The is_primary flag flipped on any event_facilities row. Auto-demote of the previous primary happens in the same transaction.

events.name: EventCancellationBroadcast
events.trigger: Fires alongside EventCancelled to trigger the cannot-opt-out notification fan-out to every registered participant + coach. Separated from EventCancelled because notification consumers subscribe to THIS event (event lifecycle) while audit consumers subscribe to EventCancelled (state transition).
consumers: notifications::DispatchEventCancellationBroadcastNotification (cannot-opt-out; individual email + push per registrant + guardian)

events.name: EventReminderScheduled
events.trigger: Fires when NotifyEventReminderJob queues a T-24h / T-1h reminder for an event. Informational — feeds ops dashboards for reminder-cadence health.

events.name: EventLivestreamActivated
events.trigger: Event.livestream_url set for the first time OR livestream_password rotated. Fires the notification to registered participants (private-tier password delivery).
consumers: notifications::DispatchEventLivestreamActivatedNotification (to registered participants — password delivery via secure email)
